content.en:
Seven Thousand and One Territory, Deep.

At this moment, Ye Tian came here, and there was no extradimensional realm around.

He is the only one who dares to come here, and other extra-dimensional realms dare not come, even if some extra-dimensional realms have clones, there are definitely not many, and the clones are difficult to refine, so they dare not sacrifice casually.

So, they definitely won't come here.

Even Ye Tian couldn't survive long here.

Now, his body was cracking, but he didn't care, just sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

His goal is not high, as long as he can comprehend a trace of extradimensional rules.

For this reason, he also brought the strange blood pupil, so that the hope of comprehending the extradimensional rules would be much greater.

After a while, this replica body was about to lose its hold.

"Copy!"

Soon, a replica body condensed, replacing the replicating body that was about to be unable to hold on.

In this way, he can hold on for a while longer.

In this way, Ye Tian relied on a replica body to continuously comprehend the extradimensional rules that escaped from the origin of the extradimensional realm.

Such extra-dimensional rules are much more conspicuous than extra-dimensional rules, and they are also easier to understand.

As the years passed, Ye Tian became more and more aware of the extradimensional rules.

However, the time for the gestation of the extradimensional territory is limited, and once it is stabilized and the extradimensional rules are no longer revealed, it will not be easy to understand.

Therefore, there is not much time for him to comprehend, at most it is only a superdimensional era time.

But after only comprehending one-tenth of the extradimensional era, Ye Tian felt that he was about to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Sure enough, it didn't take long.

Ye Tian's entire body seemed to be stagnant, his thinking seemed to be integrated into the extradimensional rules, and countless insights emerged.

In an instant, a trace of extradimensional rule fluctuations appeared on his body, and this fluctuation was completely controlled by him.

"The extra-dimensional rules have finally been understood!"

Ye Tian was very excited, although he had only comprehended a trace of extradimensional rules, he had just stepped into the threshold on a road, but the gap between comprehending extradimensional rules and not comprehending superdimensional rules was too big.

Maybe it's not comparable to those demons who comprehend the rules of the extradimensional in the half-step extradimensional realm, but he is already very satisfied.

After all, he has no backer, and those who can comprehend the extradimensional rules in the half-step transcendent realm are estimated to have the fourth and even fifth realm superdimensional rules as backers, and the treasures that can assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules can be easily taken out.

So, there is no point in comparing with those who are strong.

"Continue to comprehend and strive to comprehend the second trace of extradimensional rules!"

A trace of extra-dimensional rules is the entry, and the super-dimensional rules of 10,000 are considered to be a real realm.

Therefore, he is now extremely far away from a single extradimensional rule, let alone reaching the realm of one percent.

After comprehending a trace of extradimensional rules, he can be regarded as entering the threshold, and it is easier to continue to comprehend extradimensional rules.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally comprehended the second superdimensional rule, and then comprehended the third superdimensional rule.

Gradually, the time for an extradimensional era is approaching, and the extradimensional rules in the Seven Thousand and One Territory are also returning to their origins, which is not easy to perceive.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also attacking the tenth silk extradimensional rule.

He had already comprehended the nine-wire extra-dimensional rule, but there was a small bottleneck between the nine-filament extra-dimensional rule and the ten-filament extradimensional rule, which was not easy to break through.

At the last moment, he still broke through the bottleneck and comprehended the tenth extradimensional rule.

"It's time to go back!"

Swish!

Ye Tian returned from the core area of the 7001 Territory, and he didn't see a single extradimensional realm along the way, obviously he had already left.

......

After returning, Ye Tian's copy body began to study the extradimensional rules one by one, he didn't continue to comprehend the extradimensional rules, he didn't want to comprehend the eleventh extradimensional rules in a short time, it was not so easy. []

He just wanted to study the usefulness of extradimensional rules, but whether he could make his strength improve quickly.

After some research, he found that the extradimensional rules could assist in refining the superdimensional body, and could also refine the extradimensional resources faster and improve the cultivation.

"You can probably increase the cultivation speed by five or six times. "

Ye Tian estimated.

And after comprehending the extradimensional rules, he also had to try to create extradimensional supernatural powers.

Without comprehending the extradimensional rules, any means used are at most called extradimensional techniques, but by comprehending the extradimensional rules, you can create superdimensional supernatural powers, which is also the extreme use of extradimensional rules.

The reason why the second realm's super-dimensional realm far surpasses the first realm is not only the strength of the super-dimensional body, the profundity of cultivation, but more importantly, the super-dimensional supernatural power.

If he created a superdimensional supernatural power, he could completely kill some of the first realm superdimensional realms in seconds.

Once the super-dimensional supernatural power is created, it needs to be engraved in the super-dimensional Dao species, and the super-dimensional realm of the first realm, even if you comprehend the super-dimensional rules, there are only one or two super-dimensional supernatural powers that can be cast.

Right now, Ye Tian is still far away from the second realm, so he must rare the number of super-dimensional superpowers, and he can't create super-dimensional superpowers like spicy chicken.

It would be a pity if he could only engrave one super-dimensional supernatural power, and as a result, this super-dimensional supernatural power was still occupied by the spicy chicken supernatural power.

"I have comprehended the ten superdimensional rules, and I should be able to create a superdimensional supernatural power, but it is difficult to exert the power of superdimensional supernatural power!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, the minimum threshold for using superdimensional supernatural powers is the ten superdimensional rules, which is also the knowledge he heard from a superdimensional realm.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to try to create superdimensional supernatural powers, sometimes he had to practice, if the creation failed, it was easy to hurt himself, the normal superdimensional realm would take a long time, a little bit of dissecting and creating, if he was injured, he would cultivate countless years.

But in this way, the creation of a super-dimensional supernatural power may require hundreds of extra-dimensional epochs or even hundreds or thousands of extra-dimensional epochs.

Ye Tian didn't want to spend so long, so he created frantically, not hesitating to hurt himself.

With his continuous and desperate creation, it only took two extradimensional epochs to successfully create a very powerful extradimensional supernatural power.

Death Void.

Ye Tian stood here, stretched out his hand, and a black light instantly crossed the void, directly killing a half-step transcendent realm creature.

"The power of this blow is not bad, I suppressed the strength, and only one percent of the power was enough to kill the top half-step extradimensional realm creatures in an instant. "

"This extra-dimensional supernatural power is mainly based on annihilation, destruction, and killing, so let's name it the super-dimensional annihilation technique!"

With this super-dimensional supernatural power, Ye Tian's heart is now quite inflated.

Moreover, there was one thing he dared to do.

"Lord of the Xuhai Realm, I'm here to kill you!"
